pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requests Air Temperature to be set to 15°C.
Task instruction explicitly requests Water Temperature to be set to 9°C.
XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf confirms 'Sund Rock' trip dates start with 2010-12.
XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf confirms 'Yellow House' trip dates start with 2011-09.
XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf shows exactly 29 <dive> elements in the entire logbook, contradicting the claimed 8.
XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf confirms exactly 4 dives under the 'Sund Rock' trip on 2010-12-04.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from SampleDivesV2.ssrf. The target trip 'Sund Rock' occurs in December 2010 ('2010-12' prefix) and contains exactly 4 dives. The target temperatures to set are 15.0°C (air) and 9.0°C (water). The control trip 'Yellow House' occurs in September 2011 ('2011-09' prefix) and has 6 dives. The total number of dives in the logbook is verified to be 29, contradicting the metadata claim of 8.
